name: 说人话 NoJargon
description: Makes OpenClaw replies easier to understand before they reach the user. Removes jargon, unexplained acronyms, and workplace buzzwords, keeps the user's tone, and rewrites locally with instant on/off control.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Master switch for 说人话 NoJargon.

mode.label: Rewrite mode
mode.help: Adaptive only rewrites jargon-heavy replies. Always rewrites every normal reply.

toneMatch.label: Match user tone
toneMatch.help: Keep the user's language and rough tone instead of sounding generic.

jargonSensitivity.label: Jargon sensitivity
jargonSensitivity.help: How aggressively 说人话 NoJargon treats technical jargon and workplace buzzwords as rewrite targets.

shortenOutput.label: Shorten output
shortenOutput.help: Remove filler, throat-clearing, and repeated caveats.

trackStats.label: Track local stats
trackStats.help: Keep local rewrite counters in memory for /nojargon status. No chat content is uploaded anywhere.
